corrections.note: The body omits ἐλπίζομεν after νόμου· at the line break.

corrections.current:
τοῦ κυρίου μετὰ πάσης ἐπιεικίας ἐλε-
ημονοῦντος αὐτοῖς
corrections.correct:
τοῦ κυρίου μετὰ πάσης ἐπιεικείας ἐλε-
ημονοῦντος αὐτοῖς
corrections.note: Printed text reads ἐπιεικείας, not ἐπιεικίας.
The transcript drops ε in ἐπιδεδειγμένοις.
Lemma should match printed body reading ἐλπίζομεν.
The apparatus variant includes the prefix επι-.

notes: Running head matches. Body also correctly includes marginal line numbers 19–30 as verse numbers only where printed in text; bottom page number 666 is correctly excluded from body/apparatus.
